title: Update module github.com/moby/buildkit to v0.18.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/moby/buildkit](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit) | `v0.17.2` -> `v0.18.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.18.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.18.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.17.2/v0.18.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fmoby%2fbuildkit/v0.17.2/v0.18.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>moby/buildkit (github.com/moby/buildkit)</summary>

### [`v0.18.1`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.18.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.18.0...v0.18.1)

Welcome to the v0.18.1 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues.

##### Notable Changes

-   Fix issue where builds from older versions of clients/frontends could result in missing "no-cache" behavior or original Dockerfile commands could be missing in progress output [#​5563](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5563)

##### Dependency Changes

This release has no dependency changes

Previous release can be found at [v0.18.0](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.18.0)

### [`v0.18.0`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.18.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.17.3...v0.18.0)

buildkit 0.18.0

Welcome to the v0.18.0 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues.

##### Contributors

-   Tõnis Tiigi
-   CrazyMax
-   Akihiro Suda
-   Sebastiaan van Stijn
-   David Karlsson
-   Jonathan A. Sternberg
-   Anthony Nandaa
-   Austin Vazquez
-   Erik Sipsma
-   Marat Radchenko
-   Brian Goff
-   Erik Sjölund
-   Justin Chadwell
-   Shaun Thompson
-   Tianon Gravi

##### Notable Changes

-   Builtin Dockerfile frontend has been updated to v1.12.0 [changelog](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/dockerfile%2F1.12.0)
-   Runc container runtime has been updated to v1.2.2 [#​5532](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5532)
-   Allow graceful daemon stop while there are active history event requests [#​5522](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5522)
-   Improve performance of booting BuildKit with many local cache records (regression v0.16.0+) [#​5550](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5550)
-   Improve stacktraces on cancellation errors [#​5536](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5536)
-   Improve performance of recalculating content checksums after incremental context upload [#​5521](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5521)
-   Fix leaving unreleased references behind after SBOM generation [#​5511](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5511)
-   Make sure blob data is immediately released after deleting build history records [#​5515](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5515)
-   Fix caching HTTP resources from servers that report the same ETag for different URLs [#​5549](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5549)
-   Fix possible issue with uploaded build context when using old clients [#​5517](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5517)
-   Fix old cache keys not being cleaned up by background garbage collection (worked for manual prune) [#​5540](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5540)
-   Fix possible incorrect casing in provenance JSON [#​5524](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5524)
-   Fix possible intermittent cancellation error when building from big build context due to internal gRPC bug [#​5530](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5530)
-   Fix build errors on OpenBSD [#​5542](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5542)
-   Fix possible issue when building from tarball URL on WCOW [#​5523](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5523)
-   Fix warning of incompatible semconv configuration in OpenTelemetry [#​5503](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5503) [#​5501](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5501)

##### Dependency Changes

-   **github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim**                                     v0.12.5 -> v0.12.8
-   **github.com/cenkalti/backoff/v4**                                   v4.2.1 -> v4.3.0
-   **github.com/containerd/cgroups/v3**                                 v3.0.2 -> v3.0.3
-   **github.com/containerd/containerd**                                 v1.7.22 -> v1.7.24
-   **github.com/containerd/continuity**                                 v0.4.4 -> v0.4.5
-   **github.com/containerd/errdefs**                                    v0.1.0 -> v0.3.0
-   **github.com/containerd/typeurl/v2**                                 v2.2.0 -> v2.2.3
-   **github.com/docker/cli**                                            v27.3.1 -> v27.4.0-rc.2
-   **github.com/docker/docker**                                         v27.3.1 -> v27.4.0-rc.2
-   **github.com/go-logr/logr**                                          v1.4.1 -> v1.4.2
-   **github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2**                        v2.16.0 -> v2.20.0
-   **github.com/munnerz/goautoneg**                                     [`a7dc8b6`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/a7dc8b61c822) ***new***
-   **github.com/prometheus/client_golang**                              v1.17.0 -> v1.20.2
-   **github.com/prometheus/client_model**                               v0.5.0 -> v0.6.1
-   **github.com/prometheus/common**                                     v0.44.0 -> v0.55.0
-   **github.com/tonistiigi/fsutil**                                     [`397af53`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/397af5306b5c) -> [`31cf1f4`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/31cf1f437184)
-   **github.com/tonistiigi/go-actions-cache**                           [`58651d5`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/58651d5e11d6) -> [`394979b`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/394979b8119e)
-   **github.com/vishvananda/netlink**                                   v1.2.1-beta.2 -> v1.3.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/contrib/instrumentation/net/http/otelhttp**    v0.46.1 -> v0.53.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel**                                         v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlptrace**                v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlptrace/otlptracegrpc**  v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlptrace/otlptracehttp**  v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric**                                  v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk**                                     v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk/metric**                              v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace**                                   v1.21.0 -> v1.28.0
-   **go.opentelemetry.io/proto/otlp**                                   v1.0.0 -> v1.3.1
-   **google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/api**                        [`ef581f9`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/ef581f913117) -> [`f6361c8`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/f6361c86f094)
-   **google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc**                        [`ef581f9`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/ef581f913117) -> [`f6361c8`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/f6361c86f094)

Previous release can be found at [v0.17.2](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.17.2)

### [`v0.17.3`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.17.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.17.2...v0.17.3)

Welcome to the v0.17.3 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues.

##### Notable Changes

-   Fix issue where builds from older versions of clients/frontends could result in missing "no-cache" behavior or original Dockerfile commands could be missing in progress output. This was a regression in v0.17.2 release. [#​5563](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5563)
-   Improve performance of booting BuildKit with many local cache records (regression v0.16.0+) [#​5550](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5550)

##### Dependency Changes

This release has no dependency changes

Previous release can be found at [v0.17.2](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.17.2)

</details>
